arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah: "We will give everything tomorrow"
arts.sum: Die Werkself's skipper feels ready to face the almighty challenge of overturning Bayern Munich's 3-0 lead in Tuesday night's last-16 second-leg meeting.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch and more!
arts.sum: Both Bundesliga matches ended in a draw and Leverkusen knocked out Bayern in the DFB-Pokal. Bayern Munich dominated the first leg with a 3-0 win at the Allianz Arena and will have full control of the second leg until Leverkusen scores at least two goals.

arts.ttl: "Many unexpected things happen in football" - Xabi Alonso issues warning to Bayern
arts.sum: Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso has sent out a warning to his former club Bayern Munich that their last-16 tie is all but over despite the Bavarians' 3-0 lead.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich XI vs Bayer Leverkusen – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head to Bayer Leverkusen tonight with one foot in the Champions League quarter-finals. The German giants lead their domestic rivals 3-0 on aggregate, following an accomplished first-leg performance in Munich. Harry Kane scored twice in the first meeting, either side of Jamal Musiala’s goal for Bayern. Vincent Kompany’s side continue to pursue success […] The post Bayern Munich XI vs Bayer Leverkusen – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: The Joshua Zirkzee criticism Vincent Kompany had while managing him at Anderlecht, it has improved at Man Utd
Report: Bayern Munich star Aleksandar Pavlović sidelined with “massive viral infection”
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlović is known for two things: the next big midfielder for both Bayern Munich and Germany, and misfortune when it comes to keeping free of illness. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s second leg of the Champions League tie with Bayer Leverkusen?

arts.ttl: Report: Manchester City holds edge over Bayern Munich in pursuit of Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: In his Daily Briefing column, Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk detailed how Manchester City might actually have an edge over Bayern Munich for Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz: Manchester City have an advantage in the race for Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: How Bayern Munich’s spending compares to top clubs
arts.sum: Top 20 highest wage bills in European football last season, according to a new report from UEFA [ @Transfermarkt ] pic.twitter.com/P8s2eGUWjw The picture in Germany looks like this: Bayern Munich €430M, Borussia Dortmund €269M, RB Leipzig €202M.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich (Champions League)
arts.sum: This match was anticipated to be a thriller, but it lost a lot of its luster when Bayern Munich jumped out to a 3-0 lead on aggregate — and with the injury to Florian Wirtz over the weekend. Bayern Munich will travel to BayArena for the second leg of the Champions League tie with Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: “Only Bayern has something to lose” – Xabi Alonso ahead of Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are “convinced” that they can overturn a 3-0 deficit to beat Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 on Tuesday night. A Harry Kane brace…
